DECLARATION OF ARIELLA E. PERRY, ESQ. IN SUPPORTO OF EXTENDING THE JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR FOR THE SECOND TIME FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, CHELSEA

DEFENDANT CHELSEA MILLER'S MOTION TO CONTINUE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THE COURT ORDERED THE MOTION OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION WAS PREVIOUSLY EXTENDED TO AUG-03-2009 VIA THE JUN-18-2009 ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (212)
